mapper.select: SELECT coupon_id AS couponId, coupon_name AS couponName, discount_value AS discountValue, discount_type AS discountType, duration_days AS durationDays, is_issued_all AS isIssuedAll, created_at AS createdAt FROM coupon ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (coupon_id, coupon_name, discount_type, discount_value, duration_days, is_issued_all) VALUES (#{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{durationDays}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET coupon_name = #{couponName}, discount_type = #{discountType}, discount_value = #{discountValue}, duration_days = #{durationDays} WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon (user_id, coupon_id, is_used, expiry_date, issued_date) SELECT u.user_id, #{couponId} AS coupon_id, false AS is_used, DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (SELECT duration_days FROM coupon WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}) DAY), CURDATE() AS issued_date FROM users u CROSS JOIN coupon c WHERE c.coupon_id = #{couponId}
